response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 5–10 years of C++ experience on Windows platforms, as well as direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. While the candidate has strong software development skills in other languages and domains, their expertise does not align closely with the mandatory technical or domain-specific requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work on diverse and complex software projects
Experience with CI/CD, TDD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platforms
No direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Limited exposure to SQL Server or Oracle and messaging frameworks
